l1.safety: PASS with 0 warnings (R2★ false positive undetected at baseline)

mutations_kept.description: Narrowed R2★ credential regex from bare 'token' to access_token|api_token|auth_token|Bearer\s — eliminates false positive on 'total token cost' and similar LLM usage phrases
mutations_kept.motivation: Iter 1 discard revealed pre-existing L1 R2★ false positive that blocked all future iterations; trace evidence proved failure in helper material → Layer 3 promoted without exhausting Layer 2

mutations_kept.description: Added sentence to L1 Static Check safety scan step: 'For rules that can match multiple occurrences (e.g., R3 absolute paths), report one warning entry per distinct match value: de-duplicate identical values but list each unique path or pattern as a separate warning entry.'
mutations_kept.motivation: Trace-002 A6/A7 failed because SKILL.md did not specify how to count multiple R3 path occurrences; with 2 distinct /tmp/ paths in claude-config-manager, output needed to contain '2 warnings'; aggregation rule makes this deterministic

mutations_discarded.reason: L1 R2★ false positive: regex 'token' matched 'total token cost' in Gate section; pre-existing issue in safety-rules.md, not introduced by mutation; rolled back

known_issues_resolved: trace-002 A6/A7: R3 warning aggregation format now specified in SKILL.md
regression trace-006 stale: updated to post-fix expected_output before run
R2★ false positive on 'token cost': safety-rules.md R2 regex narrowed
known_issues_remaining: R6 regex false positive: bare 'eval' matches 'dev eval'/'strict eval' in descriptive text — currently produces warning-level false positive; consider narrowing R6 pattern in a future run
eval_mode: dry_run throughout — all L2/L3 results are simulated; a live skill-creator run would confirm with real grading
recommendation: Ship as-is. Both kept mutations are conservative and correct. Schedule a live run when skill-creator becomes available to validate L2/L3 results beyond dry_run simulation.
